# Commit message template
#
# Format:
# <type>(optional-scope): <summary>
#
# Types:
# feat, fix, docs, refactor, chore, test, build
#
# Example:
# feat(ui): improve codex log readability
#
# Body guidance:
# - why the change exists
# - what changed
# - how it was verified
#
# Footer examples:
# Refs: #123
# Closes: #123

<type>(<scope>): <summary>

Why:
- 

What:
- 

Verification:
-
